Welcome, {{1.`1`}}!

Thank you for your interest in the UA Little Rock School of Business. We're excited to share information about our Accounting program with you.

Accounting

Why Choose Accounting at UALR?

  • Expert Faculty: Faculty with CPA credentials and professional experience
  • CPA Ready: Curriculum covers all CPA exam content areas
  • Top Internships: Connections with leading firms
  • Student Orgs: Beta Alpha Psi & Accounting Society
